title: ARNav — Indoor AR Navigation
description: Unity 6 + AR Foundation indoor nav for FTMK building using QR anchors. Real-time pathfinding overlaid on the physical world.

title: ScholarHub — Academic Resource Portal
description: Centralised dashboard for students to discover, bookmark, and track academic papers, lecture notes, and group study sessions.

title: AgentOS — AI Agent Orchestration UI
description: Visual interface for spawning, monitoring, and chaining autonomous AI agents. Drag-and-drop pipeline builder with live log streams.

title: PSM Endless Runner
description: Infinite side-scroller built for a Programming & Software Methods assignment. Procedural level generation, sprite animation, high-score persistence.

title: Deep Space Observatory — Portfolio
description: Personal portfolio with a sci-fi HUD aesthetic. Three.js starfield, animated skill constellations, and a mission-log style timeline.

title: FTMK Timetable Sync
description: Scrapes the faculty timetable and exports it to Google Calendar / iCal. Handles room clashes and sends a Telegram push when a class moves.
